common.siteDescription: Free online unit converter. Convert weight, length, temperature, volume, area, speed, time, data, pressure, and energy units instantly.

home.heroSubtitle: Free, fast, and accurate unit conversions for weight, length, temperature, volume, and more. No sign-up required.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Select a unit category to get started with your conversion
home.popularSubtitle: Quick access to the most commonly used conversions

categoryDescriptions.weight: Convert between kilograms, pounds, ounces, grams, tons, and more.
categoryDescriptions.length: Convert between meters, centimeters, inches, feet, miles, kilometers, and more.
categoryDescriptions.temperature: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin scales.
categoryDescriptions.volume: Convert between liters, milliliters, gallons, cups, fluid ounces, and more.
categoryDescriptions.area: Convert between square meters, square feet, acres, hectares, pyeong, and more.
categoryDescriptions.speed: Convert between m/s, km/h, mph, and knots.
categoryDescriptions.time: Convert between seconds, minutes, hours, days, weeks, months, and years.
categoryDescriptions.data: Convert between bits, bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB, and PB.
categoryDescriptions.pressure: Convert between Pascals, bars, atm, psi, and mmHg.
categoryDescriptions.energy: Convert between Joules, calories, kilocalories, Wh, kWh, and BTU.

formulas.weight: The base unit is the kilogram (kg). Conversions use standard SI conversion factors. For example: 1 kg = 2.20462 lb, 1 lb = 0.453592 kg, 1 oz = 28.3495 g.
formulas.length: The base unit is the meter (m). Standard conversion factors apply. For example: 1 inch = 2.54 cm, 1 mile = 1.60934 km, 1 foot = 30.48 cm.
formulas.temperature: Temperature conversions use formulas rather than simple factors. °F = °C × 9/5 + 32. K = °C + 273.15. °C = (°F − 32) × 5/9.
formulas.volume: The base unit is the liter (L). For example: 1 US gallon = 3.78541 L, 1 UK gallon = 4.54609 L, 1 cup = 236.588 mL.
formulas.area: The base unit is the square meter (m²). For example: 1 acre = 4,046.86 m², 1 hectare = 10,000 m², 1 pyeong ≈ 3.306 m².
formulas.speed: The base unit is meters per second (m/s). For example: 1 km/h = 0.2778 m/s, 1 mph = 0.44704 m/s, 1 knot = 0.51444 m/s.
formulas.time: The base unit is the second. Standard conversions: 1 minute = 60 seconds, 1 hour = 3,600 seconds, 1 day = 86,400 seconds.
formulas.data: The base unit is the byte. Digital data uses binary prefixes: 1 KB = 1,024 bytes, 1 MB = 1,048,576 bytes, 1 GB = 1,073,741,824 bytes.
formulas.pressure: The base unit is the Pascal (Pa). For example: 1 atm = 101,325 Pa, 1 bar = 100,000 Pa, 1 psi ≈ 6,894.76 Pa.
formulas.energy: The base unit is the Joule (J). For example: 1 cal = 4.184 J, 1 kcal = 4,184 J, 1 kWh = 3,600,000 J.

about.title: About UnitCal
about.intro: UnitCal is a free online unit conversion tool designed to make converting between different units of measurement quick, easy, and accurate.
about.missionText: We believe that unit conversion should be simple and accessible to everyone. Whether you're a student, engineer, cook, or traveler, UnitCal provides instant, accurate conversions across a wide range of measurement categories.
about.feature1: 10 Unit Categories — Weight, length, temperature, volume, area, speed, time, data, pressure, and energy.
about.feature2: Instant Results — Conversions happen in real-time as you type. No need to press a button.
about.feature3: Multi-Language — Available in English and Korean, with more languages coming soon.
about.feature4: Mobile Friendly — Fully responsive design that works perfectly on any device.
about.feature5: Free Forever — No sign-up, no subscription, no hidden fees.
about.feature6: Accurate — Uses standard SI conversion factors and formulas for precise results.
about.accuracyText: All conversions use internationally recognized SI standards and conversion factors. Temperature conversions use the exact formulas defined by the International Temperature Scale. While we strive for maximum accuracy, results are rounded for readability and should not be used for critical scientific calculations.
about.openSourceText: UnitCal is committed to transparency. Our conversion formulas are displayed alongside every result so you can verify the math yourself.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: UnitCal ("we", "us", or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting any information collected while you use our website. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding that information.
privacy.collectText: UnitCal does not require you to create an account or provide any personal information to use our service. However, certain information may be collected automatically:
privacy.collectItem1: Usage Data: Information about how you interact with our website, including pages visited, time spent, and conversion categories used.
privacy.collectItem2: Device Information: Browser type, operating system, screen resolution, and device type.
privacy.collectItem3: IP Address: Your IP address may be collected for analytics and security purposes.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies for the following purposes:
privacy.cookiesItem1: Essential Cookies: Required for the website to function properly, such as language preferences.
privacy.cookiesItem2: Analytics Cookies: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect anonymous usage data.
privacy.cookiesItem3: Advertising Cookies: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google AdSense may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website or other websites.
privacy.thirdPartyText: We use the following third-party services:
privacy.thirdPartyItem1: Google Analytics: For website traffic analysis. Google's privacy policy can be found at https://policies.google.com/privacy
privacy.thirdPartyItem2: Google AdSense: For displaying advertisements. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your visits. You can opt out of personalized advertising at https://www.google.com/settings/ads
privacy.rightsItem1: Disable cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.rightsItem2: Opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
privacy.rightsItem3: Opt out of personalized advertising through Google's Ad Settings.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptText: By accessing and using UnitCal ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.serviceText: UnitCal provides a free online unit conversion tool that allows users to convert values between various units of measurement. The Service is provided "as is" and is intended for informational and educational purposes only.
terms.useText: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe upon the rights of others. You may not:
terms.useItem1: Use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
terms.useItem2: Attempt to interfere with, compromise, or disrupt the Service.
terms.useItem3: Use automated tools to scrape or download content from the Service without permission.
terms.disclaimerText: The Service is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis, without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any conversion results. The conversion results provided by this Service should not be used for critical applications where precision is essential.
terms.liabilityText: In no event shall UnitCal, its owners, or contributors be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the Service. This includes, but is not limited to, damages resulting from reliance on conversion results.
terms.ipText: All content, design, and code of the Service are the intellectual property of UnitCal. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without express written permission.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Your continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.contactText: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our Contact page.
